name: @borjie/recommendations
description: SOTA recommendation engine for the Tanzanian mining vertical (persona: Mr. Mwikila). Seven algorithm families (popularity, content-based, user-user CF, item-item CF, matrix factorization, LLM-rerank port, two-tower port), two bandits (Thompson Sampling, LinUCB), one cold-start router, one MMR diversity reranker, one explanation generator, five mining-domain wrappers (buyer↔mine, worker↔site, regulator↔filing, supplier↔mine, course↔worker), and a tenant-scoped hash-chained repository. Pure TypeScript; LLM reranker behind a port; tenant-strict isolation. Companion to Docs/DESIGN/RECOMMENDATIONS_SOTA_2026.md.
